title: Pink Quartz Trims
body:
![Preview of all armor trims with the quartz material](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df5df078c196b0fcff007e2fcb7f9cf3120a5ebf.png)

I've always been a little annoyed at the fact that there's still no pink material for armor trims, and since pink is my favorite color, I wanted to change that in the most vanilla-like way possible by making a resource pack.

Obviously, a vanilla resource pack can only modify existing textures, so I chose to change the quartz trim since it makes sense, and it's already super similar to the iron trim since they're pretty much the same color.

So yeah. This just changes the color palette of the trim to pink.

**Support for more versions coming in the future!**
